DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS THANH LE AND NI NGUYEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts as to each element of each cause of action for each defendant. Plaintiff shall also allege facts, not conclusions, establishing agency giving rise to liability under the circumstances of this case. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Continued To Oct-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS THANH LE AND NI NGUYEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to October 28, 2021 for Plaintiff to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copy to be delivered no later than October 8, 2021 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
